sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62880" key="lhkhth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ληκητής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ληκέω</etym>) <sense id="n62880.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bawler</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀγοραίων λ. ἐπέων</foreign> Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0537.tlg003:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
